channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Instant analysis of 49ers’ 47-24 season-ending loss at Arizona Cardinals
item.description: Jauan Jennings' ejection and Isaac Guerendo's cart-off knee injury added to the 49ers' season-long macabre in Sunday's 47-24 season-ending loss to the host Arizona Cardinals.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Playoff-bound Texans cruise to 23-14 win over the Titans, who land No. 1 draft pick
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — The Houston Texans gave what coach DeMeco Ryans wanted from their trip to Music City. Leave with a win and a healthy roster before hosting an AFC wild-card game. C.J.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Nix leads Broncos past Chiefs' reserves 38-0 and into playoffs for 1st time since 2015 season
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Rookie Bo Nix set a franchise record by completing his first 18 passes and the Denver Broncos ended an eight-year playoff drought Sunday with a 38-0 rout of the Kansas City Chiefs' bevy of backups.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Love and Watson leave Packers' loss to Bears with injuries
item.description: GREEN BAY, Wis. (AP) — Green Bay Packers quarterback Jordan Love says he lost feeling in his throwing hand before leaving Sunday’s regular-season finale, but he added that his injury shouldn′t impact his availability for the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Buccaneers clinch the NFC South, Commanders lock up the sixth seed and Packers stay at No. 7
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers clinched the NFC South and the Washington Commanders locked up the NFC’s No. 6 seed.
item.dc:creator: Rob Maaddi, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Buccaneers beat Saints 27-19 to clinch NFC South and wide receiver Mike Evans surpasses 1,000 yards
item.description: Evans caught a 9-yard pass on the final play of the game to surpass 1,000 yards for the 11th straight season, tying Jerry Rice for the most ever in the NFL and setting off a wild celebration following Tampa Bay's 27-19 victory over the New Orleans Saints on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Patriots fire coach Jerod Mayo shortly after beating Bills to finish his lone season at 4-13
item.description: The New England Patriots have fired coach Jerod Mayo after one season, beginning another reboot for the franchise just a year after it parted with longtime coach Bill Belichick.
item.dc:creator: Kyle Hightower, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Bears' game-winning field goal drops Packers in NFC playoff seeding, snaps 10-game losing streak
item.description: The Chicago Bears snapped multiple losing streaks as Cairo Santos drilled a 51-yard field goal to drop the Green Bay Packers in the NFC playoff seeding.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Patriots fire Jerod Mayo after final win loses franchise No. 1 pick in 2025 NFL Draft
item.description: The Patriots have fired Jerod Mayo after just one season following a disappointing 4-13 campaign that ended with a win that lost the franchise the No. 1 pick in the NFL Draft.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New Orleans Saints, NFL to donate $1 million to victims of truck attack
item.description: The relief contributions come after Shamsud-Din Jabbar drove a rented truck into a crowd on New Year’s Day on Bourbon Street, killing 14 people.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: Bears rally for 24-22 win in Green Bay as Packers lose Love and Watson to injuries
item.description: Caleb Williams drove Chicago to Cairo Santos’ 51-yard field goal as time expired and the Bears snapped a 10-game skid with a 24-22 victory over the playoff-bound Green Bay Packers.
item.dc:creator: Steve Megargee, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Bears shock Packers with punt return trickery for touchdown
item.description: The Chicago Bears' final regular season game saw one of the NFL's best plays of the season, as a 94-yard punt return was pure trickery against the Green Bay Packers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Joe Burrow and the Cincinnati Bengals keep their playoff hopes alive by edging the Steelers 19-17
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Joe Burrow will head to Cincinnati's training facility on Sunday. He'll lift weights. He might watch some video. And then he'll join the rest of his teammates and hope. It's not much.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US beats Czechia 4-1 to set up world junior hockey final against Finland
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — Boston University's Cole Eiserman broke a second-period tie and the defending champion United States beat Czechia 4-1 on Saturday night to advance to the world junior hockey championship game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Touchdown Tommy! Montana State's Mellott wins Walter Payton Award as top FCS offensive player
item.description: FRISCO, Texas (AP) — Montana State quarterback Tommy Mellott won the Walter Payton Award as the Football Championship Subdivision offensive player of the year Saturday night, two days before the top-ranked Bobcats face North Dakota State in the title game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ravens QB Jackson, the first member of the 4,000-900 club, looks toward playoff run
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Lamar Jackson capped a sensational regular season with a rather ordinary performance. It was still plenty good enough to set a pair of NFL records and lead the Baltimore Ravens to a second straight AFC North title.
item.dc:creator: DAVID GINSBURG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Titans would be 'absolute fools' if they don't draft Heisman Trophy winner Travis Hunter, ex-star says
item.description: The Tennessee Titans are expected to be in the quarterback market in the draft, but Chris Johnson says the team should take Travis Hunter instead.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: BYU gets trounced by #14 Houston 86-55
item.description: HOUSTON (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team came into the Big 12 season thinking it could compete with the top teams in one of the toughest leagues in the nation. But if Saturday was any indication, the Cougars have a long way to go.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BBB provides tips on buying Detroit Lions tickets, avoiding scams
item.description: The Better Business Bureau of West Michigan is providing some tips if you’re looking to buy tickets to the Detroit Lions game on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Meghan Bunchman, NewsNation

item.title: St. Pete Pier hosts 'Raise the Flags Friday' ahead of Bucs' regular season finale
item.description: The Buccaneers are counting down to the finale of their regular season. Sunday's home game against the New Orleans Saints is a must-win for the team to secure a spot in the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Beth Rousseau, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Ben Johnson likely to push for a GM besides Ryan Poles, report says
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Information continues to emerge about the Chicago Bears' looming pursuit of a new head coach. The presumptive top candidate — Ben Johnson — is tied to the latest details suggesting he would want a new general manager if he came to Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: White Sox trade for left-handed reliever from Phillies
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago White Sox traded for a left-handed reliever from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for a minor league prospect. In exchange for minor-league right-hander Aaron Combs, the White Sox acquired 31-year-old left-handed pitcher Tyler Gilbert from the Phillies.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: LeBron James' youngest son Bryce commits to Arizona
item.description: Bryce James, son of NBA star LeBron James, is heading to Arizona. Bryce James announced his decision Wednesday on Instagram and his father had a quick response.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Illinois holds off South Carolina in Citrus Bowl for first 10-win season since 2001
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Josh McCray scored his second touchdown of the game on a 9-yard run midway through the fourth quarter to give No. 21 Illinois the lead, and the Illini held on to beat No. 14 South Carolina, 21-17, in the Cheez-It Citrus Bowl on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Boys Basketball: Montgomery 75, Windward 74
item.description: KUSI (SAN DIEGO)-Montgomery playing in the fifth place game on Monday afternoon went to overtime for bonus basketball against Windward and won 75-74. Lead by Senior, JJ Sanchez who poured in 27. While fellow senior Devin Hamilton added 18, and Alek Sanchez, twin of JJ hit for 12.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Bears plan to start Caleb Williams, other healthy starters for season finale at Green Bay
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. (AP) — The Bears plan to have Caleb Williams make one more start rather than hold their prized rookie quarterback out of the season finale at Green Bay.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: How the Chicago Blackhawks brought the St. Louis Blues to life
item.description: As the St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks gear up for the 2025 NHL Winter Classic, it's worth revisiting a fascinating piece of hockey history: The Blues franchise, as St. Louis knows it today, might not exist without a helping hand from their cross-state rival.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: Coby White, Torrey Craig lead the Bulls past the Hornets in overtime, 115-108
item.description: Coby White narrowly missed his first career triple-double, finishing with 23 points, 10 rebounds and nine assists, and Torrey Craig scored 18 with five 3-pointers after halftime as the Chicago Bulls held on to beat the Charlotte Hornets 115-108 in overtime Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Blues dominate Blackhawks 6-2 in Discover NHL Winter Classic
item.description: The St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks will close the 2024 calendar year with a head-to-head battle outdoors: The NHL Discover Winter Classic.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: SDFNL All-Star Showcase
item.description:
Boys All-Star Game : Blue Stars 21- Red Stars 17
Girls Flag Football All-Star Game: Blue Stars 6 - Red Stars 0
San Diego 13U Youth Super Bowl: San Diego Bolts 34 - Oceanside Warriors 22
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: NFC's No. 1 seed comes down to Vikings-Lions showdown at Detroit in Week 18
item.description: The NFC’s No. 1 seed will come down to the final game of the regular season when the Detroit Lions host the Minnesota Vikings next Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5
